title: View AGV Information By Selecting The AGV Object
summary: Use the interface object selection behavior under AGV to display AGV-specific information for a selected AGV. The source supports that selecting the AGV object causes AGV information to be shown, but does not define the exact fields displayed.
when_to_use: Use when you need to view AGV-specific information in the interface by selecting an AGV object.
not_for: Do not use this runbook to interpret undocumented AGV information fields or values.
Do not use this runbook for AGV control, movement, recovery, or Go-to actions; the source only supports viewing AGV information after selection.

roles_and_responsibilities.responsibility: Navigate to the object selection area, select the AGV object, and observe the AGV information displayed.

safety_notes: This source describes a view/selection interaction only.
Do not infer meanings for AGV information fields that are not identified in the source.
access_or_tools_needed: Access to the object selection interface
Ability to select an AGV object

access_required: Access to the interface that contains object selection under AGV
system_preconditions: The interface is open and the object selection area is available
An AGV object is available to select

visual_references.description: Training video frame associated with the AGV object selection discussion.

steps.title: Open the object selection area
steps.purpose: Reach the interface area where object types can be selected before choosing an AGV.
steps.instruction: Go to the object selection area in the interface.
steps.expected_result: The object selection area is visible and ready for selection.
steps.healthy_condition: The interface shows the object selection controls.
steps.failure_condition: The object selection area is not visible or cannot be accessed.

actions.label: Open object selection
actions.exact_action: Go to the object selection area in the interface.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The training frame associated with the AGV object selection discussion.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if the object selection area cannot be accessed.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Transcript describes selecting the object and then selecting what you are interested in.

steps.title: Select the AGV object
steps.purpose: Choose the AGV object type so the interface shows information for the selected AGV.
steps.instruction: Under AGV, select the AGV object you are interested in.
steps.expected_result: The AGV object is selected in the interface.
steps.healthy_condition: The AGV selection is accepted by the interface.
steps.failure_condition: Selecting the AGV object does not register or does not lead to AGV information being shown.

actions.label: Select AGV object
actions.exact_action: Under AGV, select the AGV object you are interested in.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Any AGV object selection area or AGV-related selection context shown in the training frame.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if selecting the AGV object does not display AGV information.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Transcript states: select the object and then select what you're interested in; under AGV, selecting it will show the AGV information.
Training frame attached by candidate as image support for AGV object selection.

steps.title: Observe the displayed AGV information
steps.purpose: Confirm that the interface responds to the AGV selection by showing AGV-specific information.
steps.instruction: Observe the AGV information displayed after the AGV is selected.
steps.expected_result: AGV information is displayed for the selected AGV.
steps.healthy_condition: The interface shows AGV information after selection.
steps.failure_condition: No AGV information appears after the AGV is selected.

actions.label: Verify AGV information display
actions.exact_action: Observe the AGV information displayed after the AGV is selected.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The AGV-related information area that should populate after AGV selection.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if no AGV information is displayed after selection.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Under AGV, selecting it will show the AGV information.

steps.title: Use the displayed AGV information
steps.purpose: Use the displayed AGV information for the AGV item of interest without over-interpreting unsupported fields.
steps.instruction: Use the displayed AGV information for the item you are interested in, as referenced by the transcript.
steps.expected_result: The operator has the AGV information needed for the selected item.
steps.healthy_condition: The displayed AGV information is available for review or follow-on support use.
steps.failure_condition: The displayed information is insufficient, unclear, or requires interpretation not supported by the source.

actions.label: Review AGV information
actions.exact_action: Use the displayed AGV information for the item you are interested in, as referenced by the transcript.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The AGV information shown after selection; use only what is visibly presented.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if the information needed is not displayed.
Stop if interpretation would require undocumented field meanings or values.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Transcript states the user selects the object and then selects what they are interested in; under AGV, selecting it shows AGV information.

success_criteria: The AGV object can be selected under AGV in the interface.
The interface displays AGV information for the selected AGV object.
healthy_conditions: Object selection is accessible in the interface.
Selecting an AGV causes AGV information to be displayed.
failure_conditions: The object selection area cannot be accessed.
Selecting the AGV object does not display AGV information.
The source does not provide enough detail to interpret specific AGV information fields.
escalation_guidance: Escalate if selecting the AGV object does not display AGV information.
Escalate if the required AGV information is not visible after selection.
Do not infer undocumented values, labels, or meanings for AGV information fields.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Training frame associated with AGV object selection and AGV information display.

missing_details: The source does not identify the exact AGV information fields, labels, or values shown after selection.
The source does not specify the exact screen name or navigation path to the object selection area.
The source does not define any timing expectation for the AGV information to appear.
The source does not specify role boundaries beyond general operator use.
